channel.title: ICYMI Law — Blog-like Link Feed
channel.description: Popular blog-like and newsletter-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: Congress rejected some of Trump’s proposed budget cuts. OMB is making them anyway.
item.description:
President Trump and the Office of Management and Budget are accused of violating the separation of powers by attempting to unilaterally withhold funds that Congress specifically appropriated.

🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 712 · likes: 1597

item.title: ICE Quietly Arresting More People Than Ever According to Latest Data
item.description:
NEW DATA ALERT 🚨 After months of data silence, ICE's new numbers show 65,765 people in immigration detention, deportations near 1,250 a day, and arrests now at 1,473 a day.

🔥🔥 · reposts: 561 · likes: 795

item.title: 239. The Alien Terrorist Removal Court
item.description:
The Trump administration has activated a secret 30-year-old court that's never been used. Here's what we know, and why we should (and shouldn't) be worried.
